content.text:
All tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added birth logic to `nextGeneration` by collecting all neighbor candidates of live cells, filtering out cells that are already alive, then selecting those dead candidates with exactly 3 live neighbors. Deduplication ensures each born cell appears only once in the result.
**Result**: All tests now pass (5 passing, 2 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal - only added what the failing test demanded. The candidate collection directly follows the hint in the prompt (collect all neighbors of live cells that are not themselves alive), and the birth check is a single `=== 3` condition.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.

Relevant file: `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-14_20-17-13_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_sonnet-4-6/src/game-of-life.ts`
